summary: NHS-Level Strict Reference Workflow testing completed. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI for reference workflow verified - Request Reference dialog, status badges, and action buttons all functional.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employee: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle Alonge)
context_for_next_testing_agent: NHS-Level Reference Workflow fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) Public Referee Form Page at /referee/complete/:token shows error for invalid tokens, (2) Reference status endpoint returns correct structure with declared/returned details, mismatch detection, and 2-step verification status, (3) Send reference request endpoint validates referee email requirement, (4) Review reference endpoint requires mismatch notes when mismatch detected, (5) Verify reference strict endpoint requires admin role and prior review, (6) Reference 1 and Reference 2 rows show correct status badges in Compliance File tab, (7) Request Reference button opens dialog with referee details and optional message field.

public_referee_form_page.details: Page at /referee/complete/:token loads correctly, shows 'Link Expired' error for invalid tokens

send_reference_request_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/send-reference-request validates reference_num (1 or 2), requires referee email

reference_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/reference-status returns correct structure with declared/returned details, mismatch indicators, review/verify status

review_reference_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/review-reference requires mismatch notes when mismatch detected

verify_reference_strict_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/verify-reference-strict requires admin role, prior review, and response data

reference_rows_ui.details: Reference 1 and Reference 2 rows show correct status badges (Verified) in Compliance File tab

request_reference_button.details: Request Reference button appears for references without request status, opens dialog with referee details

request_reference_dialog.details: Dialog shows referee details from application, optional message field, Cancel and Send Request buttons

reference_2.workflow: Full workflow: requested -> submitted -> reviewed -> verified
reference_2.mismatch_notes: Company name variation is acceptable - verified via phone with referee
